diff:
diff --git a/src/FluentValidation/DefaultValidatorExtensions.cs b/src/FluentValidation/DefaultValidatorExtensions.cs
+	/// <summary>
+	/// Defines a minimum items validator on the current rule builder for collection properties.
+	/// Validation will fail if the number of items in the collection is less than the minimum.
+	/// </summary>
+	public static IRuleBuilderOptions<T, ICollection<TElement>> MinimumItems<T, TElement>(this IRuleBuilder<T, ICollection<TElement>> ruleBuilder, int min)
+		=> ruleBuilder.SetValidator(new MinimumCollectionLengthValidator<T, TElement>(min));
+
+	public static IRuleBuilderOptions<T, ICollection<TElement>> MaximumItems<T, TElement>(this IRuleBuilder<T, ICollection<TElement>> ruleBuilder, int max)
+		=> ruleBuilder.SetValidator(new MaximumCollectionLengthValidator<T, TElement>(max));

diff --git a/src/FluentValidation/Resources/Languages/EnglishLanguage.cs b/src/FluentValidation/Resources/Languages/EnglishLanguage.cs
+		"MinimumCollectionLengthValidator" => "'{PropertyName}' must contain at least {MinItems} items. The collection has {TotalItems} item(s).",
+		"MaximumCollectionLengthValidator" => "'{PropertyName}' must contain no more than {MaxItems} items. The collection has {TotalItems} item(s).",

diff --git a/src/FluentValidation/Validators/CollectionLengthValidator.cs b/src/FluentValidation/Validators/CollectionLengthValidator.cs
+ (new file with MinimumCollectionLengthValidator<T,TElement> and MaximumCollectionLengthValidator<T,TElement>)

excluded_defs.name: LengthValidator
excluded_defs.reason: read as a reference pattern for implementing validator structure, but the collection validators are new separate classes

exploration_log.aha_moment: LengthValidator.cs shows the exact pattern: store Min/Max, call AppendArgument in IsValid, override GetDefaultMessageTemplate calling Localized(). Mirroring that pattern for ICollection<T>.Count was straightforward.
exploration_log.hindsight: Could have also added IMinimumCollectionLengthValidator / IMaximumCollectionLengthValidator interfaces for discoverability (like LengthValidator has ILengthValidator), but the task didn't require it.

key_decisions.decision: Create two separate new classes MinimumCollectionLengthValidator<T,TElement> and MaximumCollectionLengthValidator<T,TElement>
key_decisions.reasoning: LengthValidator targets string; separate classes keep string and collection validation distinct, matching the existing MaximumLengthValidator/MinimumLengthValidator split

search_sequence.reasoning: Need to understand the validator pattern to replicate for collections
search_sequence.result: PropertyValidator<T,TValue> base; IsValid appends arguments to context.MessageFormatter; GetDefaultMessageTemplate calls Localized()

search_sequence.action: Find MinimumLength/MaximumLength extension methods in DefaultValidatorExtensions.cs
search_sequence.reasoning: Need to add analogous MinimumItems/MaximumItems methods in the same file
search_sequence.result: Found at lines 269/258 - simple one-liner SetValidator calls

search_sequence.action: Find English error message template location
search_sequence.reasoning: Need to add default messages for both new validators

queries.query_text: Add MinimumItems and MaximumItems extension methods for ICollection count validation in DefaultValidatorExtensions.cs and register default error messages in EnglishLanguage.cs

solve_notes: Created `CollectionLengthValidator.cs` with `MinimumCollectionLengthValidator<T,TElement>` and `MaximumCollectionLengthValidator<T,TElement>` classes operating on `ICollection<TElement>.Count`. Added `MinimumItems` and `MaximumItems` extension methods in `DefaultValidatorExtensions.cs` and registered default English error messages in `EnglishLanguage.cs`.
task_text:
The `CollectionPropertyRule` in `Internal/CollectionPropertyRule.cs` runs
per-element validation via `RuleForEach`, but there is no built-in
validator that checks the collection's count. Add `MinimumItems(int min)`
and `MaximumItems(int max)` extension methods in
`DefaultValidatorExtensions.cs` that attach a new `CollectionLengthValidator`
in `Validators/`, operating on `ICollection<T>` and checking `Count`.

test_selection.coverage_skip_reason: Auditor could not generate baseline coverage — see auditor report

tier_difference_reasoning: The minimum set covers the new files and changed method. An AI agent would also look at LengthValidator as the reference pattern to understand validator structure, and at MinimumLength extension method to confirm the wiring pattern, preventing unnecessary exploration of unrelated validator implementations.
